inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman in a vintage film studio, chestnut brown textured shag cut framing high cheekbones and an elegant nose, coy half-smile gazing away from camera. Half body waist up, shot on 24mm wide angle lens at eye-level straight on with dynamic perspective. Single spotlight cuts through darkness, casting dramatic shadows across her face and oversized casual hoodie. Flawless porcelain skin with dewy highlight on cheekbones, smoky gradient eye makeup, soft matte lip tint. One hand tucked in hoodie pocket, shoulder slightly turned. Cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field, rich contrast between warm spotlight and cool shadow tones. Epic SDXL photorealistic portrait quality.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
